title: Infinite loop on UPDATE
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1(a INTEGER, b INTEGER, c VARCHAR(255) DEFAULT 'default');
INSERT INTO t1(a, b, c) VALUES(1, 2, NULL), (3, 4, 'text'), (5, NULL, 'another');
UPDATE t1 SET a = a + 2 WHERE a > 0 OR b IS NULL;
SELECT * FROM t1 WHERE c IS NOT NULL;
key_bug_features: UPDATE statement causes infinite loop with specific conditions
